function.content:
---

subject: Re: Need linked invoices

---
Hi Miles,

- INV-0006 — issued 2025-12-18 — EUR 520
- INV-0007 — issued 2026-01-19 — EUR 760

Best,
Miles

The two oldest Claudia-linked invoice records read were 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md and 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md. A draft reply was created in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with those exact invoice paths attached, and the processed inbox file was deleted.
